title: Benchmark Beads listing latency across implementations
description: Benchmark listing all beads using the Beads project as dataset. Clone Beads repo into tmp/, convert .beads JSON-L to Taskulus JSON in project/, and measure total CLI runtime (startup to output) for: Beads (Go), Taskulus Python --beads, Taskulus Rust --beads, Taskulus Python JSON, Taskulus Rust JSON. Produce pretty-printed JSON results plus visual chart.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Benchmarked Beads listing latency using Beads dataset (836 issues) cloned to tmp/beads. Normalized timestamps, defaulted missing priorities to 2, removed invalid parent-child links, wrote config.yaml with extra types feature/message, and converted to project/issues JSON files. Ran 5 runs per target (cache cleared) with commands: bd --no-daemon list, python tsk --beads, rust tskr --beads, python tsk project JSON, rust tskr project JSON. Results saved to tools/tmp/beads_cli_benchmark.json; chart at tools/tmp/beads_cli_benchmark.html (opened). Key medians (ms): bd 173.4; python --beads 499.3; rust --beads 9.8 (mean 100 due to first cold run 463); python JSON 643.0; rust JSON 73.6.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added PNG chart to README and documented architecture snapshot: language duality, single-path file organization (no SQLite fallback), and performance benchmark narrative. Chart path: docs/images/beads_cli_benchmark.png; README section updated.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Refined benchmark chart: shortened x-axis labels (Go, Py/Rs variants), removed bar outlines, softened Radix-inspired colors (~55-60% brightness). Regenerated PNG at docs/images/beads_cli_benchmark.png.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Final chart tweaks: legend now on white framed background for readability; x-axis labels horizontal (short labels retained). Regenerated PNG at docs/images/beads_cli_benchmark.png.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Legend moved to upper-left and slightly smaller (10.5pt); PNG regenerated at docs/images/beads_cli_benchmark.png.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated charts: warm-only response time bar + stacked cold/warm bars; legend top-right. README and ARCHITECTURE now describe response time, include both images, and explain cold vs warm behavior (daemon/no-daemon, SQLite import spike). No commits per instructions.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Beads task recorded. Dataset prepared from Beads repo. Timing captured for all five targets including startup. Results saved as pretty JSON and chart produced.
